description: Correct (EXEMPLARY) LLM-generated SQL solutions for db_lab_2 exercises (university student/course management schema). Schema DDL not available; exercises are included as NL+SQL retrieval examples.
title: Excel EXEMPLARY: DB Lab 2 Exercises

exercises.title: db_lab_2-1
exercises.request: List the student ID and names of students enrolled before the academic year 2007/2008 who are not yet in their thesis phase (have not been assigned any advisor).
solutions:
SELECT matricola, nome, cognome
FROM studenti
WHERE iscrizione < 2007 AND relatore IS NULL

SELECT matricola, cognome, nome FROM studenti
WHERE iscrizione<2007 AND relatore IS NULL;

SELECT matricola, cognome, nome
FROM studenti
WHERE relatore isnull AND iscrizione <= 2006

SELECT Matricola, Cognome, Nome
FROM Studenti
WHERE Iscrizione < 2007 AND Relatore IS NULL
SELECT matricola, nome, cognome FROM studenti WHERE iscrizione < 2007 AND relatore IS NULL;

SELECT 
	matricola, nome, cognome
FROM 
	studenti
where 
	iscrizione < 2007 AND relatore IS NULL;

SELECT Matricola, Cognome, Nome
FROM Studenti
WHERE Iscrizione < 2007
  AND Relatore IS NULL;

exercises.title: db_lab_2-2
exercises.request: List the list of degree courses, in alphabetical order by faculty and course name, activated before the academic year 2006/2007 (excluded) and after the academic year 2009/2010 (excluded).
solutions:
SELECT facolta, denominazione
FROM corsidilaurea
WHERE attivazione < '2006/2007'
	OR attivazione > '2009/2010'
ORDER BY facolta ASC, denominazione ASC;

SELECT facolta, denominazione
FROM corsidilaurea
WHERE attivazione NOT BETWEEN '2006/2007' AND '2009/2010'
ORDER BY facolta, denominazione

SELECT facolta,denominazione
FROM corsidilaurea
WHERE attivazione<'2006' OR attivazione>'2010'
ORDER BY facolta,denominazione
SELECT cdl.facolta, cdl.denominazione FROM corsidilaurea AS cdl WHERE cdl.attivazione NOT BETWEEN '2006/2007' AND '2009/2010' ORDER BY cdl.facolta, cdl.denominazione

SELECT facolta, denominazione
FROM corsidilaurea
WHERE attivazione<'2006/2007' OR attivazione>'2009/2010'
ORDER BY facolta, denominazione

select Facolta, Denominazione
from CorsiDiLaurea
where (Attivazione <'2006/2007') or (Attivazione >'2009/2010')
order by Facolta, Denominazione asc;

SELECT Facolta, Denominazione
FROM CorsiDiLaurea
WHERE Attivazione NOT BETWEEN '2006/2007' AND '2009/2010'
ORDER BY Facolta, Denominazione;

select facolta , denominazione 
from corsidilaurea
where attivazione < '2006/2007' or attivazione > '2009/2010'
order by facolta asc , denominazione asc;

exercises.title: db_lab_2-3
exercises.request: List the student ID and names, in reverse student ID order, of students whose last name is not ‘Serra’, ‘Melogno’ or ‘Giunchi’ or who reside in a city among Genova, La Spezia, and Savona.
solutions:
select matricola,nome,cognome from studenti
where cognome not in ('Serra','Melogno','Giunchi') or 
residenza in ('Genova','La Spezia','Savona')
order by matricola desc;
SELECT s.matricola, s.cognome, s.nome FROM studenti AS s WHERE s.cognome NOT IN ('Serra','Melogno','Giunchi') OR s.residenza IN ('Genova','La Spezia','Savona') ORDER BY s.matricola DESC

SELECT Matricola, Nome, Cognome
FROM Studenti
WHERE Cognome NOT IN ('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi')
OR Residenza IN ('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona')
ORDER BY Matricola DESC;

select matricola, cognome, nome from studenti
where cognome NOT IN ('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi') OR residenza IN ('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona')
order by matricola desc

SELECT studenti.matricola, studenti.nome, studenti.cognome
FROM studenti
WHERE studenti.cognome NOT IN ('Serra','Melogno','Giunchi') 
	OR studenti.residenza IN ('Genova','La Spezia','Savona')
ORDER BY studenti.matricola DESC

select Matricola, Cognome, Nome
from Studenti
where (Cognome not in ('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi') or Residenza in ('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona'))
order by Matricola desc;

SELECT matricola, cognome, nome
FROM studenti
WHERE cognome NOT IN('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi') OR residenza IN('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona')
ORDER BY matricola DESC;

select matricola , cognome , nome
from studenti
where cognome not in('Serra','Melogno','Giunchi')
	  or residenza in ('Genova','Spezia','Savona')
order by matricola desc;

SELECT Matricola, Cognome, Nome
FROM Studenti
WHERE Cognome NOT IN ('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi')
   OR Residenza IN ('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona')
ORDER BY Matricola DESC;

SELECT Matricola, Nome, Cognome
FROM Studenti
WHERE (Cognome NOT IN ('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi'))
   OR (Residenza IN ('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona'))
ORDER BY Matricola DESC;

SELECT Matricola, Cognome, Nome
FROM Studenti
WHERE (Cognome NOT IN ('Serra', 'Melogno', 'Giunchi'))
   OR (Residenza IN ('Genova', 'La Spezia', 'Savona'))
ORDER BY Matricola DESC;

exercises.title: db_lab_2-4
exercises.request: List the student ID of students who graduated in computer science (informatica) before November 2009.
solutions:
SELECT matricola
FROM studenti JOIN corsidilaurea ON studenti.corsodilaurea=corsidilaurea.id
WHERE laurea<'2009-11-01'
	AND denominazione='Informatica';

select matricola from studenti join corsidilaurea on studenti.corsodilaurea=corsidilaurea.id 
where laurea<'1/11/2009' and corsidilaurea.denominazione='Informatica';

SELECT matricola
FROM studenti  
JOIN corsidilaurea
ON studenti.corsodilaurea = corsidilaurea.id
WHERE corsidilaurea.denominazione = 'Informatica' AND studenti.laurea < '2009-11-01'

select matricola from studenti join corsidilaurea on studenti.corsodilaurea=corsidilaurea.id
where (laurea<'2009-11-01' and corsidilaurea.denominazione='Informatica');

SELECT matricola FROM studenti join corsidilaurea on corsodilaurea=id
WHERE laurea<'2009-11-01' AND denominazione='Informatica';

select matricola from studenti
join corsidilaurea on id = corsodilaurea
where corsidilaurea.denominazione = 'Informatica' and laurea < '2009-11-01'

exercises.title: db_lab_2-5
exercises.request: Return alphabetical list of student names, with the last name of their associated advisor for each one.
solutions:
select studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, professori.cognome
from studenti
inner join professori on relatore=professori.id
order by studenti.cognome asc, studenti.nome asc;

select studenti.nome,studenti.cognome,professori.cognome "relatore" from studenti join professori on studenti.relatore=professori.id
order by studenti.cognome asc

SELECT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, professori.cognome
FROM studenti  
JOIN professori
ON studenti.relatore = professori.id
ORDER BY studenti.cognome, studenti.nome
SELECT s.cognome, s.nome, p.cognome FROM studenti AS s JOIN professori AS p ON s.relatore=p.id ORDER BY s.cognome, s.nome

SELECT s.Nome, s.Cognome, p.Cognome AS "Cognome Relatore"
FROM Studenti s
JOIN Professori p ON s.Relatore = p.id
ORDER BY s.Cognome, s.Nome;

SELECT studenti.nome, studenti.cognome, professori.cognome FROM studenti join professori on studenti.relatore=professori.id
ORDER BY studenti.cognome, professori.cognome ASC;

SELECT S.Cognome, S.Nome, P.Cognome 
FROM Studenti S JOIN Professori P ON id = Relatore
ORDER BY S.Cognome ASC
SELECT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, professori.cognome FROM studenti JOIN professori ON studenti.relatore = professori.id ORDER BY studenti.cognome ASC , studenti.nome ASC;

select Studenti.Cognome, Studenti.Nome, Professori.Cognome
from Studenti
join Professori on Studenti.Relatore = Professori.Id
order by Studenti.Cognome asc;

SELECT studenti.nome,studenti.cognome,professori.cognome FROM studenti 
INNER JOIN professori ON professori.id=studenti.relatore
ORDER BY studenti.cognome,studenti.nome ASC

exercises.title: db_lab_2-6
exercises.request: Return the list, without duplicates and in reverse alphabetical order, of students who submitted the study plan for the fifth year of the computer science (informatica) degree course in the academic year 2011/2012 and are in the thesis phase (have been assigned an advisor).
solutions:
SELECT DISTINCT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome
FROM studenti  
JOIN pianidistudio
ON studenti.matricola = pianidistudio.studente
WHERE pianidistudio.anno = 5 AND pianidistudio.annoaccademico = 2011 AND studenti.relatore IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY studenti.cognome DESC, studenti.nome DESC

SELECT DISTINCT s.cognome, s.nome FROM studenti AS s JOIN pianidistudio AS pds ON s.matricola=pds.studente AND s.relatore IS NOT NULL AND pds.annoaccademico=2011 AND pds.anno=5 ORDER BY s.cognome DESC, s.nome DESC
select distinct cognome,nome from studenti join pianidistudio on matricola=studente and relatore is not null and annoaccademico=2011 and anno=5 order by studenti.cognome DESC, studenti.nome DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome FROM studenti join pianidistudio on 
studenti.matricola=pianidistudio.studente
WHERE pianidistudio.anno=5 AND pianidistudio.annoaccademico=2011 AND studenti.relatore IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY studenti.cognome DESC;

select cognome, nome from studenti
join pianidistudio on studente = matricola
where pianidistudio.anno = '5' 
AND pianidistudio.annoaccademico = '2011'
AND studenti.relatore IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY cognome desc

SELECT DISTINCT cognome, nome
FROM studenti JOIN corsidilaurea on studenti.corsodilaurea = corsidilaurea.id 
JOIN pianidistudio on pianidistudio.studente = studenti.matricola
WHERE pianidistudio.anno = 5 AND pianidistudio.annoaccademico = '2011' and relatore IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY cognome DESC;

select distinct cognome , nome
from pianidistudio join studenti on studente = matricola
where annoaccademico = 2011 and anno = 5 and relatore is not null
order by cognome desc , nome desc;

SELECT DISTINCT studenti.nome,studenti.cognome FROM studenti 
INNER JOIN pianidistudio ON pianidistudio.studente=studenti.matricola
WHERE pianidistudio.anno = 5 AND studenti.relatore  IS NOT NULL and pianidistudio.annoaccademico = 2011
ORDER BY studenti.cognome DESC

exercises.title: db_lab_2-7
exercises.request: List last name, first name, and status (‘studente’/‘professore’) of students and professors. [A query can return a constant value; just include this value in the SELECT clause.]
solutions:
SELECT cognome, nome, 'studente' AS qualifica
FROM studenti 
UNION 
SELECT cognome, nome, 'professore' AS qualifica
FROM professori;

select studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, 'Studente' as Qualifica
from studenti
UNION
select professori.cognome, professori.nome, 'Professore' as Qualifica
from professori;

SELECT studenti.nome, studenti.cognome, 'studente' AS qualifica
FROM studenti 
UNION 
SELECT professori.nome, professori.cognome, 'professore' AS qualifica
FROM professori

select studenti.cognome,studenti.nome, 'studente' as qualifica from studenti 
union 
select professori.cognome,professori.nome, 'professore' as qualifica from professori

SELECT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, 'STUDENTE' as qualifica
FROM studenti
UNION
SELECT professori.cognome, professori.nome, 'PROFESSORE' as qualifica
FROM professori

SELECT Nome, Cognome, 'Studente' as Qualifica
FROM Studenti 

UNION 

SELECT Nome, Cognome, 'Professore' as Qualifica
FROM Professori;
SELECT s.nome, s.cognome, 'studente' AS qualifica FROM studenti AS s UNION SELECT p.nome, p.cognome, 'professore' AS qualifica FROM professori AS p
select nome,cognome, 'studente' as qualifica from studenti UNION select nome,cognome, 'professore' as qualifica from professori;

SELECT Cognome, Nome, 'Studente' AS Qualifica 
FROM Studenti
UNION
SELECT Cognome, Nome, 'Professore' AS Qualifica 
FROM Professori;

SELECT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, 'studente' AS qualifica /*si crea una colonna virtuale con valore costante scelto da noi*/
FROM studenti

UNION 

SELECT professori.cognome, professori.nome, 'professore' AS qualifica
FROM professori;

select cognome,nome,'studente' as qualifica from studenti
union select cognome,nome,'professore' as qualifica from professori;

(SELECT studenti.nome, studenti.cognome, 'studente' AS qualifica
FROM studenti)
UNION
(SELECT professori.nome, professori.cognome, 'professore' AS qualifica
FROM professori);

select studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, 'studente' as qualifica from studenti
UNION
select professori.cognome, professori.nome, 'professore' as qualifica from professori

select Studenti.nome,Studenti.cognome, 'Studente' AS professione
from Studenti 
UNION
select professori.nome,professori.cognome,'Professore' AS professione
from Professori;

SELECT studenti.cognome, studenti.nome, 'studente'
FROM studenti
UNION
SELECT professori.cognome, professori.nome, 'professore'
FROM professori
SELECT nome, cognome, 'studente' FROM studenti UNION SELECT nome, cognome, 'professore' FROM professori ;

SELECT Studenti.cognome, Studenti.nome, 'studente' from Studenti
UNION
SELECT Professori.cognome, Professori.nome, 'professore' from Professori

SELECT Cognome, Nome, 'studente' AS Qualifica
FROM Studenti
UNION ALL
SELECT Cognome, Nome, 'professore' AS Qualifica
FROM Professori;

select studenti.cognome,studenti.nome,'studente'as qualifica
from studenti
union 
select professori.cognome,professori.nome,'professori'as qualifica
from professori;
SELECT studenti.nome,studenti.cognome,'STUDENTE' AS QUALIFICA FROM studenti UNION SELECT professori.nome,professori.cognome,'PROFESSORE' AS QUALIFICA FROM professori

SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'studente' AS Status
FROM Studenti
UNION ALL
SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'professore' AS Status
FROM Professori;

SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'studente' AS Status
FROM Studenti
UNION
SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'professore' AS Status
FROM Professori;

SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'professore' AS Status
FROM Professori
UNION
SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'studente' AS Status
FROM Studenti;

SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'professore' AS Status
FROM Professori

UNION ALL

SELECT Cognome AS LastName, Nome AS FirstName, 'studente' AS Status
FROM Studenti;

exercises.title: db_lab_2-8
exercises.request: List the computer science students who passed Databases 1 (basi di dati 1) but not Graphic Interfaces (interfacce grafiche) in June 2010.
solutions:
select matricola
from studenti
inner join esami on studenti.matricola=esami.studente
	where esami.corso like 'bdd1%'
	and esami.voto >= 18
	and esami.data >= '2010-06-01'
	and esami.data <= '2010-06-30'
except
select matricola
	from studenti
inner join esami on studenti.matricola=esami.studente
	where esami.corso like 'ig%'
	and esami.voto >= 18
	and esami.data >= '2010-06-01'
	and esami.data <= '2010-06-30';

exercises.title: db_lab_2-9
exercises.request: List the computer science students who passed both Databases 1 (basi di dati 1) and Graphic Interfaces (interfacce grafiche) in June 2010.
solutions:
select matricola
from studenti
inner join esami on studenti.matricola=esami.studente
	where esami.corso like 'bdd1%'
	and esami.voto >= 18
	and esami.data >= '2010-06-01'
	and esami.data <= '2010-06-30'
intersect
	select matricola
	from studenti
inner join esami on studenti.matricola=esami.studente
	where esami.corso like 'ig%'
	and esami.voto >= 18
	and esami.data >= '2010-06-01'
	and esami.data <= '2010-06-30';

SELECT esami.studente
FROM esami
WHERE esami.corso = 'bdd1n' AND esami.voto >= 18 AND esami.data BETWEEN '2010-06-01' AND '2010-06-30' 
INTERSECT
SELECT esami.studente
FROM esami
WHERE esami.corso = 'ig' AND esami.voto >= 18 AND esami.data BETWEEN '2010-06-01' AND '2010-06-30'
